title: SovrnAgentCredential (SD-JWT-VC envelope)
description: SD-JWT-VC envelope for the Sovrn agent credential (Layer 1 D6/E6) — the selective-disclosure form alongside the W3C VC 2.0 JSON-LD envelope. This schema validates the DECODED issuer-JWT payload of an ISSUED credential. Disclosable claims (principalDID, principalSiName, capabilities[].jurisdictions, verificationStatus.principalKYC, verificationStatus.principalKYCTier) do NOT appear as plaintext properties in the issued payload: they travel as salted digests in _sd arrays and materialize only when the holder discloses them at presentation. Always-disclosed claims sit in the clear JWT body: a verifier can always see WHAT KIND of credential and WHAT ACTION is claimed, even when the principal and jurisdictions are withheld. The disclosed-presentation shape (post-disclosure validation) is a tracked future artifact.

vct.description: Verifiable credential type (SD-JWT-VC). For Sovrn agent credentials: https://schema.sovrn.place/agent/v1

iss.description: Issuer DID (zone authority, platform, or self). Key material resolves from the issuer's DID document.

exp.description: Expiry (seconds since epoch); pairs with the VC 2.0 envelope's validUntil

sub.description: Agent DID (did:sovrn:agent:{uuid} or other DID method) — always disclosed

agentType.description: Agent operational mode — always disclosed. OPTIONAL per Layer 1 D1 (not a trust signal).

principalType.description: Principal class — always disclosed. Default NATURAL per Layer 1 D2. (The principal's IDENTITY — principalDID — is disclosable, not the class.)

issuanceMethod.description: How this credential was issued — always disclosed (the basis of authority is always verifiable)

_sd.description: Salted digests for this capability's disclosable claims (jurisdictions per Layer 1 D6)

capabilities.description: Agent capabilities. action is always disclosed; jurisdictions is disclosable (travels via the per-capability _sd array).

agentCodeAudit.description: Whether the agent code has been audited — always disclosed

agentBehaviorStatus.description: Agent behavior assessment result (implementation-defined values) — always disclosed

_sd.description: Salted digests for the disclosable verification claims (principalKYC, principalKYCTier per Layer 1 D6)

verificationStatus.description: Verification status. principalKYC and principalKYCTier are disclosable; the agent-audit fields are always disclosed.

credentialHash.description: Cryptographic hash of the credential content — always disclosed. Algorithm prefix provides agility.

status.description: Status mechanism reference (BitstringStatusList entry), mirroring the VC 2.0 envelope's credentialStatus

cnf.description: Holder key-binding confirmation (SD-JWT-VC cnf claim), when key binding is used

_sd.description: Top-level salted digests for the disclosable claims (principalDID, principalSiName per Layer 1 D6)

$comment: The `not` constraint enforces the D6 discipline structurally: the ISSUED payload must never carry the top-level disclosable claims (principalDID, principalSiName) in plaintext — they travel only as _sd digests. Mapping: this envelope and the W3C VC 2.0 envelope express the same logical credential from one signing event; OID4VCI carries this form.
